original: \nHer feint fails - you duck under her slicing blow and scamper out of the way. She reloads her gun with a loud click and a focused stare.
\nHer feint succeeds - she lands a blow with her blade!
\nHer attack falls far short of hitting you. Instead, her bullet whizzes past harmlessly.
\nThere’s a ringing shot and a dull ache of impact
\nA hot, burning sensation sprays out from your chest. Your [pc.legs] go weak and you fall to the ground.
\nWith such shoddy vision, her grenade throw falls short of her mark. You dart back and easily dodge the resulting blast.
\nThere’s a loud ‘whump’ and a cloud of red mist swiftly engulfs you.
Fortunately for you, the smoke doesn’t leak through your airtight [pc.armor], but it obscures your vision just briefly.

\nThere’s a loud ‘whump’ and a cloud of red mist swiftly engulfs you. Your skin prickles and your [pc.nipples] harden. Lower down, a glorious ache spreads through your [pc.groin]. All you want to do is touch yourself!
\n\nYou resist her erotic enticements... for now.
\n\nYou try to resist her erotic enticements to little avail!
